texto: When you're depressed and you think of killing yourself. Stop. If you're afraid to talk about your problems to someone, write down your thoughts, your feelings; let your frustrations go. Nobody has to see what you write but you. It's like writing to your good self until you find that version of you again. Don't give up on yourself. You're amazing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rochelle A.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “When you're depressed and you think of killing yourself. Stop. If you're afraid to talk about you…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, depression, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e inspiracional.

frase_original: When you're depressed and you think of killing yourself. Stop. If you're afraid to talk about your problems to someone, write down your thoughts, your feelings; let your frustrations go. Nobody has to see what you write but you. It's like writing to your good self until you find that version of you again. Don't give up on yourself. You're amazing.
